docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT FINDS THAT ALL INTERESTED PARTIES HAVE BEEN SERVED WITH NOTICE OF FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS AND THAT NOTICE BY PUBLICATION HAS BEEN PROPERLY PERFORMED, AS REQUIRED BY HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 11484.4(C) AND (E). THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,537.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT FRANCISCO REUS. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $6,148.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE) ALSO FILED BY CLAIMANT REUS, FRANCISCO T
